title: Прометей и огонь — ориджин бренда
style: Flat minimalist vector mascot style, same character design, proportions, dark teal background and warm palette as the reference image(s). Vertical 9:16, full body, centered, no text, clean bold shapes.

scenes.image: majestic gods on a glowing Olympus mountain guarding a great sacred flame for themselves, far above; below in shadow a weak mortal youth sits slumped and discouraged with no flame
scenes.motion: the great flame glows on high, the mortal sits slumped in shadow below
scenes.vo: Боги держали огонь дисциплины для себя. Люди сдавались.
scenes.caption: Огонь держали для богов

scenes.image: Prometheus the bearded titan in a toga secretly steals a small bright spark from the great sacred flame, cupping it in his hands, bold and caring expression
scenes.motion: Prometheus cups a stolen spark in his hands, it glows brighter, he glances back boldly
scenes.caption: Прометей украл искру

scenes.image: Prometheus gently places a tiny living flame creature with cute eyes into the open palm of the mortal youth, who looks up in wonder, the little flame blinking to life
scenes.motion: the little flame creature blinks to life in the mortal's palm, warm glow spreads, the youth smiles
scenes.vo: И вложил живой огонёк в ладонь смертного.
scenes.caption: Огонь — теперь твой

scenes.image: the mortal youth stands tall and determined holding his little flame creature now burning big and bright, glowing with confidence, ready to act
scenes.motion: the mortal stands tall, the flame flares up big and bright with rising sparks
scenes.vo: Огонь дисциплины теперь твой. Не дай ему погаснуть.
scenes.caption: Не дай ему погаснуть
